zh.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman於1499年出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利。她於1517年與Sir Henry Everard在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年在英國英格蘭肯特享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman于1499年出生在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利。她于1517年与Sir Henry Everard在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年在英国英格兰肯特享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wiseman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English wise ‘wise, discreet’ (see Wise 1) + man, also wise-man ‘wise, thoughtful, rational, skilled, or intelligent person, a cunning man’ (Old English wīs + mann). The name may also have been used ironically.

variants.name: Wise
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman was born in 1499, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Henry Everard in 1517, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1559, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman est née en 1499, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Everard en 1517, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1559, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman wurde 1499 in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1517 in England Sir Henry Everard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1559 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman è nata il nel 1499 nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Henry Everard nel 1517, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1559, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wisemanは1499年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた。1517年にイギリスでSir Henry Everardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年にイギリスイギリスケントで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman(은)는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1517년 영국에서 Sir Henry Everard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman nasceu em 1499, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Everard em 1517, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1559, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman родилась в 1499 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Everard в 1517 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1559 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Wiseman nació en 1499, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir Henry Everard en 1517, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1559, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
